name: cook-lab
description: Claude Code skills for the Cook Lab (OHRI) — project management and electronic lab notebook in the lab's Notion Teamspace.

plugins.name: cook-lab-notion
plugins.description: Manage projects, tasks, and the electronic lab notebook in the Cook Lab Notion Teamspace. Bundles the Notion connection. You do the science; Claude writes the notebook.

plugins.name: cook-lab-research
plugins.description: Research productivity toolkit: rigorous literature reviews, and scaffolding new analysis/grant projects with lab conventions (literature-review, project-spec, project-init).

plugins.name: cook-lab-analysis
plugins.description: Single-cell & spatial analysis toolkit: scRNA-seq/spatial methods, lab figure style, and analysis conventions + environment setup (scrna-spatial, visualization, analysis-conventions). Opt-in; prescribes the lab analysis environment.
